plugins.name: terminology-audit
plugins.description: Two independent skills for auditing terminology: terminology-audit for human-facing technical/engineering docs (produces a termbase + audit report), and sdd-terminology-audit for spec-driven-development spec files (produces lint-style ambiguity alerts plus a termbase). Pick the skill that matches your input — they don't chain.

plugins.name: vocabulary-contract
plugins.description: Turn a termbase.csv controlled vocabulary into an enforceable naming contract for spec-driven development: render it into AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md agent context, enforce it against draft specs and proposals, and surface new candidate terms after an implementation.
